response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced engineer with genuine developer-tooling interest — including direct IDE development experience on NI LabWindows/CVI and authoring test runners and assertion libraries — but the role's core stack is essentially absent. Java appears only peripherally, and there is no evidence of Kotlin, Spring, or broader JVM-ecosystem depth, which are hard requirements for building enterprise Java/Kotlin IDE features.
strengths: Hands-on IDE development experience (C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI)
Proven language-tooling and DX interest (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, MCP code generators)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, low-latency systems, large-scale request handling
concerns: No Kotlin and no Spring/enterprise-framework experience, both required qualifications
Java exposure is minimal and dated; primary stacks are TypeScript/Node and DLang
No demonstrated deep JVM understanding (build tools, app servers, runtime internals)
